title: Stacje synoptyczne – współrzędne WMO OSCAR/Surface
provider: World Meteorological Organization (WMO) – OSCAR/Surface; station IDs cross-referenced with IMGW-PIB current SYNOP endpoint
license_note: WMO Resolution 1 commits WMO to free and unrestricted international exchange of Earth-system data. WMO wis2box documentation identifies OSCAR/Surface as the key station-metadata resource and documents caching OSCAR station metadata by WIGOS ID. This reviewed import contains station coordinates/metadata resolved from public OSCAR/Surface search responses and must keep WMO/OSCAR attribution.
attribution: Współrzędne stacji synoptycznych: WMO OSCAR/Surface; identyfikatory stacji i dane pomiarowe: IMGW-PIB; przetworzenie: MeteoLens.
redistribution_note: Public redistribution is treated as allowed with attribution under the reviewed WMO data-policy and OSCAR/Surface station-metadata caching guidance. Commercial-use clearance is not asserted by MeteoLens; re-review current WMO/OSCAR terms before commercial deployment or downstream redistribution.
update_cadence: Manual reviewed refresh. Re-run scripts/geometry/fetch_oscar_synop_stations.py against the current IMGW SYNOP station list and re-import with python -m app.geometry.import_cli.
known_limitations: Coordinates come from WMO OSCAR/Surface station metadata resolved by WIGOS ID pattern 0-20000-0-<IMGW id_stacji>. This import covers the 62 stations present in the IMGW current SYNOP endpoint during the 2026-07-07 refresh. Station metadata can change independently of IMGW observations; not suitable for cadastral/legal positioning.
dataset_version: OSCAR/Surface public search API fetched 2026-07-07; IMGW SYNOP station list observed 2026-07-07 20:00 Europe/Warsaw

review.notes: Official WMO pages describe OSCAR as WMO's global repository of observing-system capabilities, and WMO wis2box docs document fetching/caching station metadata from OSCAR/Surface by WIGOS ID. WMO Unified Data Policy Resolution 1 documents free and unrestricted Earth-system data exchange. Live verification on 2026-07-07 resolved all 62 current IMGW SYNOP station IDs through OSCAR WIGOS IDs.
